queries.question: Show me duty-free shops and souvenir stores that are located at Terminal 3.
queries.sql:
SELECT RetailOutlets.Name 
FROM RetailOutlets
WHERE (RetailOutlets.type = "Duty-Free Shop" OR RetailOutlets.type = "Souvenir Store") AND RetailOutlets.location = "Terminal 3"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?retailoutlets a :RetailOutlets .
  ?retailoutlets p:name ?name .
  ?retailoutlets p:type ?type_w .
  ?retailoutlets p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?retailoutlets p:location ?location_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Duty-Free Shop" || STR(?type_w2) = "Souvenir Store")) && STR(?location_w) = "Terminal 3"))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT RetailOutlets.Name 
FROM RetailOutlets
WHERE RetailOutlets.type = "Duty-Free Shop" OR RetailOutlets.type = "Souvenir Store" AND RetailOutlets.location = "Terminal 3"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?retailoutlets a :RetailOutlets .
  ?retailoutlets p:name ?name .
  ?retailoutlets p:type ?type_w .
  ?retailoutlets p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?retailoutlets p:location ?location_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Duty-Free Shop" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Souvenir Store" && STR(?location_w) = "Terminal 3")))
}
